li.a: Logical Observation Identifiers, Names and Codes (LOINC)

p.span: New or worsening breast exam findings

pre.code:
library ScreeningEligibleEvents version '1.0.0'
using FHIR version '4.0.1' include FHIRHelpers version '4.0.1' called FHIRHelpers
include DataElements version '1.0.0' called DataElements
context Patient
define "eve-female": DataElements."de-female"
define "eve-breastca": DataElements."de-breastca"
define "eve-mastectomy": DataElements."de-mastectomy"
define "eve-breastsymptoms": DataElements."de-breastsymptoms"
define "eve-breastfindings": DataElements."de-breastfindings"

display.value: Value set LEFT UNILATERAL MASTECTOMY PROCEDURE
Value set RIGHT UNILATERAL MASTECTOMY PROCEDURE
New or worsening breast exam findings
